name: Tool Acquisition Detected
description: A tool that could be used for malicious activities has been detected being downloaded. This indicates a potential attack preparation phase.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the tool download event.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that initiated the download.

parameters.name: source_address
parameters.description: The source IP address of the download (e.g., internal client IP).

parameters.name: destination_address
parameters.description: The destination IP address of the download (e.g., external server IP).

parameters.name: tool_name
parameters.description: The identified name of the downloaded tool.

parameters.name: source_url
parameters.description: The URL from which the tool was downloaded.

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: The hash of the downloaded file (e.g., SHA256).
